purpose: Manual reload QA after minimum visible naming cleanup
steps: Click Reload on the installed extension.
Confirm the visible extension name is NODAL OS.
Confirm the main heading is NODAL OS.
Confirm no NEXA text appears in the main installed extension shell.
Review the sidepanel console for critical red errors.
Capture the console screenshot if critical errors appear.

goNoGoAfterReload.htmlMinimumPatch: NO-GO until reload evidence confirms shell naming and no critical console errors.
goNoGoAfterReload.manifestNaming: GO only for this completed minimum metadata cleanup; further manifest work requires a separate extension review.
